title: helichrysum heldreichii
intro: Helichrysum heldreichii, also known as the Greek helichrysum, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae, characterized by its yellow flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of helichrysum include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum is often prepared in herbal remedies such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, relieve pain, and support overall well-being.
